name: circuit-skill
description: Textbook-grounded circuit analysis skills for Chinese postgraduate entrance exam preparation.

interface.shortDescription: Textbook-grounded circuit analysis and exam review.
interface.longDescription: Solve and diagnose circuit-analysis answers from a local textbook scan, recognize and redraw schematics, independently verify results, and finish with concepts, patterns, pitfalls, and exam checks.
defaultPrompt: 请优先依据教材解答这道电路题，并列出知识点与考点。
诊断这份错误答案，定位第一个错误并给出修正解答。
识别这张电路图，核对拓扑后再求解。
